name: Notion

Establish ownership of your company domain and take actions on workspaces that belong to your verified domain (request ownership transfer, delete, claim). Domain management

name: Microsoft Teams
tagline: Hub for teamwork in Microsoft 365
description: Microsoft Teams is a collaboration platform that combines workplace chat, video meetings, file storage, and application integration. It's deeply integrated with Microsoft 365 and serves as the hub for teamwork.

name: Google Meet
tagline: Video meetings for Google Workspace
description: Google Meet is a video conferencing solution that's part of Google Workspace. It provides secure, high-quality video meetings with deep integration into Google Calendar, Gmail, and other Google services.

name: Telegram
tagline: Cloud-based mobile and desktop messaging app
description: Telegram is a cloud-based messaging app known for its speed, security, and powerful features. It supports large groups, channels, bots, and file sharing with no size limits on cloud storage.

name: GitHub Copilot
tagline: Your AI pair programmer
description: GitHub Copilot is an AI-powered code assistant that helps you write code faster. It offers inline suggestions, chat-based assistance, and can generate entire functions from natural language descriptions.

name: Resend
tagline: Email API for developers
description: Resend is a modern email API designed for developers. It offers a simple, developer-friendly interface for sending transactional emails, with features like React Email integration, webhooks, and detailed analytics.

name: Cal.com
tagline: Open source scheduling infrastructure
description: Cal.com is an open source scheduling platform that allows individuals and businesses to manage appointments, meetings, and events. It integrates with Google Calendar, Outlook, and many other tools.

name: Unkey
tagline: API key management for developers
description: Unkey is an open source API key management platform. It provides fast key verification, rate limiting, and usage tracking, making it easy to manage API access for your applications.

name: Trigger.dev
tagline: Background jobs framework for TypeScript
description: Trigger.dev is an open source background jobs framework for TypeScript. It allows you to create long-running jobs with built-in retries, scheduling, and observability, without managing infrastructure.

It serves as a reference for developers and AI enthusiasts interested in understanding the underlying prompts and architectures of these tools.

name: deer-flow
tagline: An open-source framework for building long-horizon super agents that research, code, and create.
description: DeerFlow is an open-source SuperAgent harness designed for long-horizon tasks. It leverages sandboxes, memories, tools, skills, subagents, and a message gateway to handle complex tasks that can take minutes to hours. Built on LangChain, it is suitable for developers and researchers building advanced AI agent systems.
